source: RBI Fair Practices Code (sample rules — Person 2 will refine)

rules.name: Unilateral interest rate change
rules.description: Lender reserving a unilateral right to change the interest rate is a fair-practice red flag.

rules.name: Excessive compounding
rules.description: Frequent compounding may inflate the effective rate well above the headline rate.

rules.name: Very high headline rate
rules.description: Headline interest rates above usual limits warrant scrutiny.

rules.name: Penal / default interest
rules.description: Penalty charges that may exceed RBI fair-practice norms.

rules.name: Late payment charges
rules.description: Late charges require clear, up-front disclosure.

rules.name: Termination without notice
rules.description: Termination without reasonable notice violates fair-practice expectations.

rules.name: One-sided arbitration
rules.description: Arbitrator chosen unilaterally by the lender is structurally biased.

rules.name: Restrictive jurisdiction
rules.description: Restrictive jurisdiction clauses limit a borrower's redress options.

rules.name: Broad indemnity
rules.description: Customer bears indemnity disproportionate to actual risk.

rules.name: Disclaimer of liability
rules.description: Lender disclaims liability that should be borne by them.

rules.name: Waiver of consumer rights
rules.description: General waiver of consumer rights — against RBI fair-practice code.
